_meta.purpose: SQL query patterns for Qwen Coder 14B — ready-to-use PostgreSQL templates for all common collection portfolio questions.
sql_rules: Always use double quotes for column names with spaces: "Op bucket", "Cust ID", "Bounce status"
Always use COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") for customer-level metrics — NEVER plain COUNT
Use NULLIF(denominator, 0) to avoid division by zero
Use ROUND(..., 2) for percentage and ratio fields
Use ILIKE for case-insensitive string filters if needed
Date column is "Next Date" — filter using = '2026-02-01' format (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
NULL values: use IS NULL / IS NOT NULL. See null_handling in business_logic.json
Use GROUP BY for aggregations across categories
Use ORDER BY at end of grouped queries

bounce_count.description: Count of customers who bounced (Tech or Non Tech)
bounce_count.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Bounce Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')

bounce_count_with_branch_filter.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Bounce Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')
  AND "Branch" = '{BRANCH_VALUE}'

bounce_percent.description: Bounce rate as percentage of total customers
bounce_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0),
2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM final_table

bounce_by_branch.description: Bounce count and rate grouped by branch
bounce_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "Branch",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Bounce Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Total Customers",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0),
  2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Branch"
ORDER BY "Bounce Count" DESC

bounce_by_region.description: Bounce count and rate grouped by region
bounce_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "Region",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Bounce Count",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech') THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0),
  2) AS "Bounce %"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Region"
ORDER BY "Bounce Count" DESC

bounce_tech_vs_nontech_by_branch.description: Bounce count split by Tech vs Non Tech per branch
bounce_tech_vs_nontech_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "Branch",
  "Bounce status",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Bounce status" IN ('Tech', 'Non Tech')
GROUP BY "Branch", "Bounce status"
ORDER BY "Branch", "Count" DESC

resolution_count.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Resolution Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Cust wise status" = 'Norm'

resolution_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Cust wise status" = 'Norm' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0),
2) AS "Resolution %"
FROM final_table

resolution_by_branch.sql:
SELECT
  "Branch",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Cust wise status" = 'Norm' THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Resolved Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Total Customers",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Cust wise status" = 'Norm' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0),
  2) AS "Resolution %"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Branch"
ORDER BY "Resolution %" DESC

bucket_distribution.description: Count and outstanding by Op bucket
bucket_distribution.sql:
SELECT
  "Op bucket",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Customer Count",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "Balance Principal",
  SUM("TOD") AS "Total Overdue"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Op bucket"
ORDER BY "Loan Count" DESC

bucket_movement_matrix.description: Opening bucket vs Closing bucket movement matrix
bucket_movement_matrix.sql:
SELECT
  "Op bucket",
  "Closing bucket",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Customer Count"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Op bucket", "Closing bucket"
ORDER BY "Op bucket", "Closing bucket"

cust_wise_status_summary.sql:
SELECT
  "Cust wise status",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Customer Count",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Cust wise status"
ORDER BY "Customer Count" DESC

coverage_percent.description: Coverage % — visited allocated customers vs all allocated
coverage_percent.sql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Visit or not" = 'Visited' AND "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END), 0),
2) AS "Coverage %"
FROM final_table

coverage_by_tl.sql:
SELECT
  "TL",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Visit or not" = 'Visited' AND "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Visited Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Allocated Count",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Visit or not" = 'Visited' AND "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END), 0),
  2) AS "Coverage %"
FROM final_table
WHERE "TL" <> 'No TL'
GROUP BY "TL"
ORDER BY "Coverage %" DESC

visit_intensity_by_bucket.description: Average visit intensity by Op bucket
visit_intensity_by_bucket.sql:
SELECT
  "Op bucket",
  ROUND(SUM("Visit Count")::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0), 2) AS "Avg Visits per Customer",
  SUM("Visit Count") AS "Total Visits",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Customer Count"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Op bucket"
ORDER BY "Op bucket"

npa_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "Region",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "NPA Loan Count",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "NPA Customer Count",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "NPA Outstanding"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Op bucket" = 'NPA'
GROUP BY "Region"
ORDER BY "NPA Loan Count" DESC

add_npa_by_region.description: New NPA additions (Add NPA = 1) by region
add_npa_by_region.sql:
SELECT
  "Region",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "New NPA Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Add NPA" = 1
GROUP BY "Region"
ORDER BY "New NPA Count" DESC

portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.description: Total bal_prin and TOD by Op bucket
portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.sql:
SELECT
  "Op bucket",
  SUM(bal_prin) AS "Balance Principal",
  SUM("TOD") AS "Total Overdue",
  COUNT(loanappno) AS "Loan Count"
FROM final_table
GROUP BY "Op bucket"
ORDER BY "Balance Principal" DESC

digital_cash_by_mob.description: Payment channel (Digital vs Cash) by MOB bucket
digital_cash_by_mob.sql:
SELECT
  "MOB Bucket",
  "Digital/cash",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID") AS "Customer Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Digital/cash" IS NOT NULL AND "Digital/cash" <> ''
GROUP BY "MOB Bucket", "Digital/cash"
ORDER BY "MOB Bucket"

dpd_distribution.sql:
SELECT
  dpd_casewise,
  "Op bucket",
  "Branch",
  "Region"
FROM final_table
WHERE dpd_casewise IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY dpd_casewise

fe_scorecard.sql:
SELECT
  "Allocation 1",
  "TL",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Cust wise status" = 'Norm' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0), 2) AS "Resolution %",
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Visit or not" = 'Visited' AND "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END), 0), 2) AS "Coverage %",
  ROUND(SUM("Visit Count")::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "Cust ID"), 0), 2) AS "Intensity",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Allocated or not" = 'Allocated' THEN "Cust ID" END) AS "Allocated Count"
FROM final_table
WHERE "Allocation 1" <> 'NA'
GROUP BY "Allocation 1", "TL"
ORDER BY "Resolution %" DESC

filter_snippets._note: Append these to WHERE clause or AND conditions in any SQL query
